name: Union Temporal Identity
work_cycles: Trade summits, arbitration surges, and market turnover define lived time more than harvest alone
feast_days: Guild gatherings and market festivals function as civic time peaks
legal_deadlines: Contract enforcement and sanction review set public urgency rhythms
shipping_windows: Caravan and port schedules bunch around market pulses, seasonal route reliability, and dispute resolution windows
weather_expectations: Trade actors track route weather pragmatically across multiple polities
mourning_and_renewal_customs: Commercial communities remember collapse through debt, settlement, and reputation restoration
public_language_about_time: People speak in contract windows, fair dates, summit periods, and settlement deadlines
